person.name: Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter

memoryArtifacts.headline: Coat of arms, House of Estridsen

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
English and Danish excerpts from Wikipedia:

"Estrid was born around 990 *or* around 997."

"In 1047, her son became king in Denmark due to his mother's descent, and is hence known by the matronymic Sven Estridssen. Estrid herself was granted the *honorary title* of Queen [...] despite the fact that *she was not a monarch* nor the spouse of one." 

"THE DATE OF HER DEATH IS UNKNOWN, but it can be no earlier than 1057 or later than 1073, as it is known that Bishop William of Roskilde officiated at her funeral, and he was in office between 1057 and 1073."

"She was widely believed to have been buried in the northeastern pier of the Roskilde Cathedral, but a DNA test in 2003 DISPELLED THE MYTH as the remains belonged to a woman much too young to be Estrid." 

"Estrid Svendsdatter var dronningemoder af Danmark mens hendes søn, Svend Estridsen (opkaldt efter hende) var konge. Hun byggede en ny kirke i Roskilde, som formodentlig var den første stenkirke i Danmark."

"Sammen med Ulf Jarl fik Estrid to sønner: Svend Estridsen og Asbjørn Jarl. Ægteskabet var måske et forsøg fra Knuds side på at skaffe mere loyalitet omkring sig, men det virkede ikke og i 1026 blev Ulf dræbt i Roskilde Domkirke af Knuds mænd. Mandens formodede konspiration bragte dog ikke Estrid i unåde hos broren Knud. Tværtimod fik hun nu store jordbesiddelser i Skåne og på Sjælland i erstatning."

"Det siges at hendes moder Sigrid nægtede at lade sig omvende til kristendommen, mens Estrid havde et godt forhold til kirken. Som rig enke skænkede hun jordegods til Roskilde Domkirke (efter 1057) og byggede for egne midler hvad der sandsynligvis var den første stenkirke i Danmark i Roskilde. Estrid skaffede sønnen Svend en kirkelig uddannelse der blev bemærket af pave Pave Gregor 7. Estrid blev lagt til hvile i Roskilde Domkirke." 


https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Estrid_Svendsdatter
https://da.wikipedia.org/wiki/Estrid_Svendsdatter


[NB: Information sourced from Wikipedia is subject to change by third-parties. Follow the URL noted above to review the latest content.]

.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter於0990年出生在丹麥奧本哈福奧姆洛斯吉爾德 多姆恩洛斯吉爾德時，她的父親Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staelland31歲，母親Świętosława Gunhild Polska40歲。她於1016年與Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark在丹麥奧本哈福奧姆洛斯吉爾德 多姆恩洛斯吉爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1047年5月9日在瑞典斯奧享年57歲，埋葬在丹麥奧本哈福奧姆洛斯吉爾德 多姆恩洛斯吉爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter于0990年出生在丹麦奧本哈福奧姆洛斯吉爾德 多姆恩洛斯吉爾德时，她的父亲Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staelland31岁，母亲Świętosława Gunhild Polska40岁。她于1016年与Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark在丹麦奧本哈福奧姆洛斯吉爾德 多姆恩洛斯吉爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1047年5月9日在瑞典斯奧享年57岁，埋葬在丹麦奧本哈福奧姆洛斯吉爾德 多姆恩洛斯吉爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Estrid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English or Continental Germanic personal name composed of Eastre (the name of a goddess of spring, whose name lies behind modern English Easter) + hild ‘battle’. According to legend, Estrildis was the name of a German princess who was captured and brought to Britain. She so enchanted King Locrine that he left his wife Gwendolen for her: in revenge, Gwendolen had both Estrildis and her daughter Sabrina thrown into the River Severn and drowned.

nameMeanings.name: Margrethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Christianity Becomes Official Religion of Sweden
historicEvents.description: King Olof Skotkonung converts to Christianity and makes it the official religion of Sweden. Skotkonungj was baptized by the missionary Sigrid in Husaby in Vastergotland. Skotkonung was the first Swedish king to remain Christian throughout his reign.
King Canute is declared ruler of Denmark, England and Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter was born in 0990, in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Denmark, her father, Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staelland, was 31 and her mother, Świętosława Gunhild Polska, was 40. She married Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark in 1016, in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 9 May 1047, in Skåne, Sweden, at the age of 57, and was buried in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter est née en 0990, à Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danemark, son père, Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staelland, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Świętosława Gunhild Polska, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark en 1016, à Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1047, à Skåne, Suède, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter 0990 in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staelland 31 und ihre Mutter Świętosława Gunhild Polska 40. Sie hat 1016 in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dänemark Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1047 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Skåne, Schweden und wurde in Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dänemark begraben.

Lei sposato Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark nel 1016, nel Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatterが0990年にデンマーククoベンハヴンスoンメロスキルド ドムソグンロスキルドで生まれた時，父Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staellandは31歳，母Świętosława Gunhild Polskaは40歳であった。1016年にデンマーククoベンハヴンスoンメロスキルド ドムソグンロスキルドでUlf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1047年5月9日にスウェーデンスクaンで57歳で死去し，デンマーククoベンハヴンスoンメロスキルド ドムソグンロスキルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter(이)가 0990년 덴마크 ko벤하브 스o 로스킬드 돔소그 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staelland(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Świętosława Gunhild Polska(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1016년 덴마크 ko벤하브 스o 로스킬드 돔소그 로스킬드에서 Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1047년 5월 9일 스웨덴 스ka니에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 ko벤하브 스o 로스킬드 돔소그 로스킬드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter nasceu em 0990, em Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dinamarca, seu pai, Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staelland, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Świętosława Gunhild Polska, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark em 1016, em Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1047, em Skåne, Suécia, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter родилась в 0990 г. в местности роскаилд, роскаилд домсогн, сoмм, кoбенавн, Дания, её отцу по имени Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staelland было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Świętosława Gunhild Polska, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark в 1016 г. в местности роскаилд, роскаилд домсогн, сoмм, кoбенавн, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 9 мая 1047 г. в местности скaн, Швеция в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности роскаилд, роскаилд домсогн, сoмм, кoбенавн, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Estrid Margrethe Svendsdatter nació en 0990, en Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dinamarca, su papá, Sveyn I Haraldsson Eight King of England De'Staelland, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Świętosława Gunhild Polska, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Ulf Thorgilsson Jarl of Denmark en 1016, en Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1047, en Skåne, Suecia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dinamarca.
